name: James Webb Space Telescope
description: At the Sun-Earth L2 Lagrange point — 1.5 million km from Earth. Never to be serviced. Sees light from 13.4 billion years ago, from the first stars and galaxies after the Big Bang. 25 years to build. The most complex scientific instrument ever deployed. It works.
scale_fact: JWST is 3,676 times farther from Earth than the ISS. The Hubble servicing missions took 10 days. JWST cannot be serviced at all — it was designed to be perfect first time.
